name: Modern hypergolic propulsion.
body: A hypergolic engine for reusable spacecraft. HTP, fast to integrate, designed for the demands of reusable infrastructure.
Sized for the 350+ kg small-sat market, then scaled across the vehicle layer.

name: Orbital vehicles.
body: Reusable in-space vehicles built around P78 propulsion. Refuelable in orbit, cislunar range from day one — sized to move payloads, service assets, and recover them across the in-space economy.
